examples.text: Ta catli titlatzihui, xiquintlachili nopa tzitzime quen tequitij. Ximomachti catli quichihuaj para timotlalnamictis.
examples.translation: You who are lazy, find the ants that work. Go and do as they do, so that you may be wise.
examples.english: You who are lazy, find the ants that work. Go and do as they do, so that you may be wise.
